name: /measure-rubric: appends triage results to rubric/fp-log/<rule-id>.jsonl
command: echo "y" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --interactive --n 1 >/dev/null && test -s rubric/fp-log/*.jsonl && echo ok >&2
setup: mkdir -p rubric/fp-log && git init -q && git config user.email t@t && git config user.name t && echo x>f && git add f && git commit -q -m c
